title: NIO: GPC Spending over £500, December 2024
body: "Northern Ireland Office (NIO) publishes details of all spending over £500 using an electronic purchasing card solution (ePCS) on a monthly basis. The ePCS has replaced the government procurement card (GPC).  This data is also available on data.gov.uk.  *ePCS: electronic purchasing card solution  *GPCs: government procurement cards  *GPC: government procurement card "
